method: SkillOpt-adapted rollout -> judge -> validation-gate (citation tier, wave A)
held_out_queries: Does Mind specify author-date vs notes, and what reference style for the accepted paper?
What happens if I leave self-identifying references in the review copy?

edits.summary: Elevate anonymization from best-practice to the verified hard gating consequence: 'papers not prepared for anonymous refereeing will not be read.' Concrete author-date-vs-notes convention correctly left as live-check (the source map specifies none — inventing one would violate the never-invent rule).
edits.grounded_in: official-source-map.md (verified quote: 'papers not prepared for anonymous refereeing will not be read')
